creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
This is a port of Namazu full-text search system 2.0.

  It depends on my previously submitted japanese/p5-kakasi and
devel/p5-File-MMagic ports which are currently uncommitted.

Fix: 

/
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."--UrJy2BBtFZfRxpQiSWbq4YW5FyPnzPXCjie6L17sZ5OovRAD
